description: Known-debt entries for tools/check-exports-parity.js. Each entry quarantines a single .js/.d.ts export-drift item with an owner and either an expiry date or a tracking issue. Expired or unused entries fail the check.

fields.path: Repo-relative path to the .js file whose sibling .d.ts drifts.
fields.kind: onlyInJs | onlyInDts — which side has the unmatched symbol.
fields.symbol: Exported identifier that does not appear on the other side.
fields.reason: Why the drift is tolerated. Plain prose, one sentence.
fields.owner: Person or team responsible for clearing this entry.
fields.created: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the entry was added.
fields.expires: ISO date the allowance lapses. Required unless `issue` is set.
fields.issue: Tracking URL. Required unless `expires` is set.
